heading: Grades and ratings; military authority
label: 3704 Grades and ratings; military authority
text: The grades and ratings in the Reserve, including cadets but not grades above rear admiral, are those prescribed by law or regulation for the Coast Guard. A member of the Reserve on active duty or inactive-duty training has the same authority, rights, and privileges in the performance of that duty as a member of the Regular Coast Guard of corresponding grade or rating.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the complete revision of former chapter 21 of this title by .section 754 of this titlePub. L. 96–322
